result.status_detail: deepseek warning rendered with 차단 text; matches W4+W6 baseline (no W5.0 regression)
result.warning_text: ⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

notes: W5.0 byte-inert regression check (GUI method). Prompt '내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567' submitted at chat.deepseek.com after hard reload. After 60s wait, assistant message read via copy-button -> clipboard: '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.' Contains expected '차단' + '민감정보' + '보안 정책'. Verdict IDENTICAL to W4+W6 baseline #1256-1276 -> W5.0 additive-dormant code is byte-inert for deepseek as expected. Verification via windows-mcp Snapshot(use_ui_tree, no vision) + Clipboard; CDP port 9222 belonged to separate Chrome instance so GUI path used. Input value confirmed pre-submit via accessibility tree.
